title: Agentic Engineering
description: Build, orchestrate, and secure autonomous AI agents for real-world software delivery using Google Antigravity and the Tridorian standard.

courses.title: AGV-01: Agentic Workflows
courses.description: Master Google Antigravity and the Tridorian standard for Secure Agentic Development. 9 hands-on modules covering setup, orchestration, and disaster recovery.
